student_name: Eliane Portela Nogueira Lima de Brito
hub_subtitle: Business English for a doctor rebuilding her professional voice

lesson.menu_title: The Road Ahead — Talking About the Future with Confidence
lesson.menu_desc: The future perfect and future continuous (By next year we will have opened three clinics; this time next month I will be presenting to the board) to map where the business is going -- 31 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 17 -- The Road Ahead
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Eliane Portela | Aula 17 -- The Road Ahead: Talking About the Future with Confidence

listenings.text: Hi Eliane, it is Nathan. I have been looking at your roadmap for next year, and I am impressed. Let me tell you what I see on the horizon. By this time next year, you will have opened the second clinic, and if the numbers hold, you will have broken into the São Paulo market properly. This time next quarter, you will be running two teams at once, so the priority now is the people. Do not scale up faster than you can hire. Here is my one piece of advice. Six months from now, when the investors call, you will not be pitching an idea anymore. You will be reporting real growth. So keep building the foothold you have, stay ahead of schedule where you can, and remember, the trajectory matters more than any single month. This is the year the plan comes together.

Hi team, it is Eliane. I want to share where we are heading, because the road ahead is exciting. By the end of this year, we will have opened the second clinic and we will have hired eight new people. This time next spring, we will be running both sites at the same time, so we need the systems ready now. There are two things in the pipeline that could be real game changers, and if the pilot works, they will give us a springboard into a whole new market. I will not pretend it will be easy. We will be ramping up fast, and some weeks will be an uphill climb. But by our third anniversary, we will have built something that felt impossible on day one. The trajectory is clear. Let us go and meet it.
